name: Tostada Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Waffles: Preheat waffle maker.
2. Place all ingredients into the blender container.
3. Cover; process at a medium speed until dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Do not over blend.
5. Pour 1/2 cup batter over center of grids.
6. Close waffle maker.
7. Bake until golden, about 2 minutes.
8. Yield: 4 waffles.
Meat Sauce:
1. Prepare mix according to package directions.
2. Place 1/4 cup sauce on each waffle.
3. Add toppings.
Toppings:
1. On each waffle, top the meat sauce with 2 tbsp cheese, 1/4 cup lettuce, and 2 tbsp tomato.
2. Garnish with 1 tbsp sour cream and olives.
3. Serve immediately.
